column2: pivot_longer(cols = c(rhcc3_clinical_f, rhcc3_clinical_m), names_to = "CHW", names_prefix = "rhcc3_clinical_", values_to = "rhcc3") %>%
mutate(CHW = factor(CHW, levels = c("m", "f"), labels = c("Male", "Female")))) +
geom_bar(aes(y = rhcc3, x = `Health Zone`, fill = `Health Zone`, alpha = CHW),
geom_point(aes(y = rhcc3_target, x = `Health Zone`, fill = `Health Zone`, alpha = "Target"), color = NA) +
labs(fill = "Health Zone", x ="Health Zone", y = "# CHWs trained", alpha = "CHW gender") +
